title: Destructuring Assignment
description: Unpack values from an object into local variables easily.
problemStatement:
Save typing with destructuring! Given `let person = { name: "Alice", age: 30 }`, use object destructuring to extract `name` and `age` into local variables. Print `name`.

**Requirement:** Use the `{ name, age } = person` syntax.
hints: This is a common pattern for handling function parameters too!
